semantic_description: Checks whether a length-n character array is a palindrome without modifying memory. The function initializes left to 0 and right to n - 1, then uses a while loop that compares symmetric positions s[left] and s[right]. It returns 0 immediately when a mismatching pair is found, otherwise advances the two pointers toward the middle and returns 1 when all compared pairs match. For n <= 1 the loop is skipped and the function returns 1 while preserving CharArray::full(s, n, l).
